summary: Muddy soundboard recording of a shaky Alpine show with a disastrous Stella Blue start.
review: The only SBD circulating captures an uneven performance – the band stumbles on tracks like Stella Blue, which opens as a “train wreck,” and overall playing is described as poor. The audio is muddy at times, though fans are grateful that any soundboard source exists for this obscure 6/22/88 Alpine gig.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers criticize both the performance and the audio quality, with only one high‑rating comment noting the rarity of an SBD source; this yields a low overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Muddy at times, lacks clarity and warmth; not a hot recording despite being the only SBD available.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Inconsistent set with first‑time songs (Foolish Heart, I Will Take You Home) but overall below‑average execution; the show feels uneven and under‑rehearsed.
